title: [BOUNTY] Report a Bug — 5-15 RTC
body:
## Bug Report Bounty — 5-15 RTC

Find and report real bugs in the RustChain ecosystem.

### Severity Tiers
| Tier | Reward | Examples |
|------|--------|---------|
| Low | 5 RTC | UI glitches, typos in error messages, cosmetic issues |
| Medium | 10 RTC | Incorrect calculations, broken API responses, edge cases |
| High | 15 RTC | Data loss, security issues, consensus bugs, crash bugs |

### Requirements
- Must be a real, reproducible bug (not a feature request)
- Include steps to reproduce
- In

title: [BOUNTY] Report a bug with reproduction steps (0.5 RTC)
body:
## Bounty: 0.5 RTC per valid bug report

Found something broken? Report it with clear reproduction steps and earn 0.5 RTC.

### What counts
- CLI tool errors or unexpected behavior
- API endpoint returning wrong data
- Documentation that contradicts actual behavior
- UI/explorer display issues

### Bug report format
1. **What happened**: Description of the bug
2. **Expected**: What should have happened
3. **Steps to reproduce**: Exact commands or actions
4. **Environment**: OS, Python version, e

title: [BUG] [alpha] New Debug Configuration: Close (X) button has no tooltip or accessible name
body:
### Project

cortex

### Description

The panel header has a close button (X) with no `title` or `aria-label`, so screen reader users and hover users don’t get a clear “Close” explanation.

### Error Message

```shell

```

### Debug Logs

```shell

```

### System Information

```shell
$ bounty info
```

### Screenshots

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8e19ec2c-c08c-44de-b1b6-e70ce1001a70

### Steps to Reproduce

Open the New Debug Configuration panel. Focus or hover the X button.
